title: Fart Fighter
description:
A game about farting your way to victory. 

Welcome to Anytown where the malls are overrun with hoodlums and only one man, Fart Fighter, has the intestinal fortitude to set things right.

Follow Fart Fighter through each level as he unleashes his flatulence with extreme prejudice on hoodlums, corrupt cops, and more!

Fart Fighter is a single-player, top-down action game where players use farts to defeat enemies and clear levels. Enemies and stages grow more complex as the player travels across the land from mall to mall.

Consume and combine four foods imbued with different elemental essences to give your farts unique effects. Collect coins from defeated enemies and buy equipment and power-ups to help battle formidable adversaries.

Transform Fart Fighter from a basic mall cop into the ultimate weapon in the arsenal of flatulence, and help him take down the biggest methane monolith in the land.

Players can expect to finish the story in 1 to 2 hours, while custom level building offers endless opportunities to create the ultimate challenge and hilariously bottom-burp their way to victory.
description_short: Fart Fighter is a 2D, top-down, pixel-art action game, where players travel across a world map, progressing through levels while collecting equipment, powerups and combining food to craft different farts and eliminate enemies.
